title: PromptsExportBundleV1
description: User-facing export/import envelope produced by the macro-controller prompts dropdown (Export button, JSON/ZIP/SQLite formats). Distinct from the build-time PromptsBundle schema (prompts-bundle.schema.json) which uses PascalCase keys for aggregate-prompts.mjs output. This envelope uses camelCase and mirrors the runtime PromptEntry shape in standalone-scripts/macro-controller/src/types/ui-types.ts (L47-70).

id.description: Random UUID for this bundle. Lets importers detect re-imports of the same file.

schemaVersion.description: Envelope schema version. Increment only for breaking changes.

exportedAt.description: UTC ISO-8601 timestamp when the bundle was produced.

entryCount.description: Number of items in entries[]. Importers cross-check against entries.length.

format.description: Which serialization the entries were streamed through. Optional; defaults to 'json' when the envelope is embedded inline (JSON export). ZIP/SQLite exports set this explicitly.

PromptEntry.description: Mirror of the runtime PromptEntry (ui-types.ts L47-70). name and text are required; slug is strongly recommended for stable merge keys. Dynamic-expansion fields must round-trip so Next ${N} / Plan ${N} variants survive import (fixes gap identified in plan 12 step 1).
